creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 168365
patch-usb-dbg

This patch adds some printfs to help debug usb problems.  Please put it in /usr/ports/print/cups/files, then rebuild and reinstall cups.  Next change "LogLevel warn" in /usr/local/etc/cups/cupsd.conf into "LogLevel debug" and restart cupsd by running "service cupsd restart".  Try to setup the printer and print a test page and then email me /var/log/cups/error_log.
